title: Pararistolochia laheyana
taxonomy: Pararistolochia laheyana is a species of flowering plant in the family Aristolochiaceae. This plant is a part of the genus Pararistolochia, which consists of tropical plants native to various regions. The Aristolochiaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as Dutchman's pipes or pipevines. The classification of Pararistolochia laheyana places it within the order Piperales, which includes other flowering plants such as the pepper family. Pararistolochia laheyana is also classified as a member of the clade magnoliids, a group of flowering plants that have been around since the early Cretaceous period.
